env.description: Environment variables passed to the Docker container. Values are converted to strings by the task.

hosts.description: Extra /etc/hosts entries passed as Docker --add-host options.

cmd.description: Shell command to run inside the container.

envFile.description: Path to a file with environment variables.

forcePull.description: Pull the image before running the container.

debug.description: Enable debug logging for the Docker invocation.

pullRetryCount.description: Number of times to retry pulling the image.

pullRetryInterval.description: Delay between image pull attempts in milliseconds.

logOut.description: Write stdout to the process log.

logErr.description: Write stderr to the process log.

saveOut.description: Capture stdout in the task output.

saveErr.description: Capture stderr in the task output.

ok.description: Whether the Docker command completed with a successful exit code.

stdout.description: Captured stdout, or null when stdout capture is disabled.

stderr.description: Captured stderr, or an empty string when stderr capture is disabled.
